title: Richly Toasted American Nut Tagine
description: A plant-based, one-pot American dish featuring oyster sauce and tempering chocolate, cooked in a tajine clay vessel. This nutty and crispy tagine is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together oyster sauce, tempering chocolate, and olive oil.
Add sliced almonds, chopped onions, minced garlic, and pumpkin seeds to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Season the mixture with salt to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a tajine clay vessel.
Bake the tagine in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and stir the mixture.
Return the tagine to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
